prompt_text:
### Demographics: 79-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 50.4 kg; Height 163.8 cm; BMI 18.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 135/81 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.8%; 9 months ago 9.4%; 6 months ago 8.9%; 3 months ago 8.4%; current 7.9%), FPG (12 months ago 211mg/dL; 9 months ago 236mg/dL; 6 months ago 218mg/dL; 3 months ago 219mg/dL; current 164mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 49.9kg; 9 months ago 50.9kg; 6 months ago 52.3kg; 3 months ago 47.9kg; current 50.4kg), Height (12 months ago 163.8cm; 9 months ago 163.8cm; 6 months ago 163.8cm; 3 months ago 163.8cm; current 163.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 18.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 137mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 136mmHg; 3 months ago 136mmHg; current 135mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 84mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 81mmHg; 3 months ago 83mmHg; current 81mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 104U/L; 9 months ago 91U/L; 6 months ago 86U/L; 3 months ago 83U/L; current 101U/L), AST (12 months ago 104U/L; 9 months ago 98U/L; 6 months ago 99U/L; 3 months ago 96U/L; current 108U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 31mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; current 27mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 440mg/g; 9 months ago 337mg/g; 6 months ago 353mg/g; 3 months ago 375mg/g; current 466mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 93mg/dL; 9 months ago 88mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 94mg/dL; current 91mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 49mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 45mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 120mg/dL; 9 months ago 123mg/dL; 6 months ago 106mg/dL; 3 months ago 124mg/dL; current 113mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.8g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 11.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.32 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
